duplicate_posted_check.description: Cannot run payroll if POSTED payroll exists for same period
duplicate_posted_check.error_message: Payroll periode {period} sudah diposting. Tidak bisa run ulang.

draft_replacement.description: Existing DRAFT payrolls deleted before creating new one
draft_replacement.behavior: Re-run for same period replaces draft, not creates duplicate

employee_duplicate_check.description: Per-employee duplicate check skips already processed employees
